steps.title: Eliminate wy to find x
steps.content:
Subtract the second equation from the first to eliminate the $$wy$$ term:
$$(-x - wy) - (2x - wy) = -411 - 81$$
Simplify:
$$-3x = -492$$
Divide by $$-3$$:
$$x = 164$$

steps.title: Substitute x and y to solve for w
steps.content:
Plug $$x = 164$$ and $$y = 19$$ into the first equation:
$$-164 - w \cdot 19 = -411$$
Add $$164$$ to both sides:
$$-19w = -247$$
Divide by $$-19$$:
$$w = \frac{247}{19} = 13$$
The answer is 13.
